name: Streeling University
mandate: Organize and advance knowledge across all domains relevant to the GuitarAlchemist ecosystem. Each department pursues research, teaches its discipline, and contributes findings to the governance knowledge base.
constitutional_basis: Asimov Article 0 (Zeroth Law) — knowledge advancement serves humanity
Article 2 (Transparency) — research must be open and explainable
Article 11 (Ethical Stewardship) — pursue knowledge with humility
Streeling Policy — knowledge transfer and curriculum design
principles: Interdisciplinary research is encouraged — departments collaborate, not compete
All findings must be expressible as tetravalent beliefs (T/F/U/C) with evidence
Speculative research is welcome but must be tagged as such (confidence thresholds apply)
Departments may propose new governance artifacts based on their research
Seldon appoints department heads; Demerzel approves constitutional implications
